stories.headline: Bitcoin clears $77K, on pace for best month in a year as $5B USDT mints fuel rebound
stories.tldr: BTC trades above $77,000 and is up over 13% in April, its strongest monthly run in a year, supported by $5 billion in fresh USDT supply.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: stablecoin issuance has historically led spot rallies; another leg up risks blowing out the deeply negative funding rates whales are quietly leaning into.
the_details: BTC up 13%+ in April, on track for best monthly performance since April 2025.
USDT supply expanded by ~$5B during the rebound, per CoinDesk on April 24.
Whales are building long positions even as perp funding stays deeply negative.

stories.headline: Aave USDC pool nearly empty as KelpDAO contagion drives $14B DeFi TVL drop
stories.tldr: The April 18 KelpDAO rsETH exploit cascaded through lending markets, draining DeFi TVL from $99B to $85B in 48 hours and leaving Aave's USDC pool nearly dry.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Circle is publicly demanding urgent action on USDC liquidity, signalling that stablecoin issuers may now police DeFi risk faster than governance can.
the_details: $292M KelpDAO rsETH bridge exploit on April 18 triggered the cascade.
Aggregate DeFi TVL fell from ~$99B to ~$85B over 48 hours.
Circle is pressing Aave for emergency action to restore USDC liquidity.

stories.headline: Charles Schwab opens spot BTC and ETH trading to retail brokerage clients
stories.tldr: Charles Schwab launched direct spot trading of Bitcoin and Ethereum across its retail brokerage in April, putting crypto next to equities and fixed income for tens of millions of clients.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Schwab's footprint dwarfs every crypto-native broker combined; the on-ramp shifts from app downloads to a single Schwab login, accelerating the IRA and 401(k) thesis.
the_details: Spot BTC and ETH trading is now native inside Schwab retail accounts.
Service sits alongside equities, fixed income and existing ETF coverage.
Move follows broader institutional push: 80% of institutions plan 2-5% AUM allocation to digital assets.

stories.headline: 100+ crypto firms led by Coinbase and Ripple push Senate to mark up Clarity Act
stories.tldr: A coalition of more than 100 crypto firms is urging the Senate Banking Committee to mark up the Clarity Act and finalize a federal market-structure framework for digital assets.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: even after the March SEC-CFTC joint guidance, statutory clarity is the missing piece for banks and brokerages still gated on counsel sign-off.
the_details: Signatories include Coinbase, Ripple and 100+ other firms, per CoinDesk on April 23.
Letter targets Senate Banking Committee and the Clarity Act markup.
Builds on March 17 SEC-CFTC 68-page joint interpretive release establishing a 5-category token taxonomy.

stories.headline: Crypto week ahead: Fed, BoJ, ECB, BoE all set rates as Big Tech earnings collide
stories.tldr: Four major central banks set policy this week alongside Microsoft, Amazon, Meta, Google and Apple earnings, plus US Q1 GDP and March PCE — a stacked macro gauntlet for crypto.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: BTC's near-perfect inverse correlation with the dollar is at a near-4-year extreme, so any FOMC or PCE surprise will flow straight into crypto books.
the_details: FOMC concludes Wednesday; BoJ, ECB and BoE also decide rates this week.
MSFT, AMZN, META, GOOG report midweek; AAPL plus Q1 GDP and March PCE on Thursday.
Compound, Decentraland and Frax DAOs all close key governance votes by April 27.
